description: Create a CodeQL GitHub Actions workflow that analyzes code on push to master and 1.6.x branches, on pull requests to master, and weekly on Saturdays. Run an ubuntu-20.04 job with read permissions for actions and contents, and write permission for security events. Use a matrix strategy to analyze cpp, javascript, and python languages, checking out the repository with submodules, installing dependencies, initializing CodeQL, building the code, and performing CodeQL analysis.
